description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear plush and generously filled. The sofa is upholstered in a solid, light-colored fabric that gives it a clean and contemporary look, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, providing comfort without excessive bulk. Four slender, exposed legs, likely made of metal, support the sofa at each corner, elevating it above the ground and contributing to its airy aesthetic. The backrest is straight and runs the full width of the sofa, with the loose cushions providing additional support and comfort. The overall construction suggests a sturdy frame, likely wood or metal, with soft cushioning for seating comfort.
description: A modern, light-colored three-seater sofa with plush, loose cushions and slim metal legs, featuring a minimalist and comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large back cushions, three seat cushions, and both armrests, highlighting the sofa's full seating capacity and symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, padded armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions, with all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the armrest and cushion depth from the other end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and three individual seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged in a single row; cushions are not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, flush with the seat and backrest, with a simple, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, straight legs positioned at each corner, likely metal with a dark finish, exposed and slightly inset from the sofa's edges.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, full-width backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions providing support; no visible tufting or segmentation in the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching; the upholstery appears matte and uniform in texture.
